title: Oritech - Nicer Pipes
body:
This ressource pack aims to make Oritech pipes nicer, specially the item pipe with the chest exture and red border.

Textures are inspired by the craft of the item and the colors of the mod.

![Screenshot of the modified pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d2c726ad6485bb8ecdac3978ff27e1cc6e77fc.png)

This ressource pack was posted on CurseForge and Modrinth. Download from there if you want to support me.
